flavorPhrases: Between the thick roots of an old oak, pressed flat under leaf litter -- {container}.
The mossy stump is hollow. Someone used it as a cache, and not long ago.
Bark stripped from a birch reveals a recess sealed with pine resin. Still dry inside.
A rock that doesn't sit right. The soil beneath is freshly turned.
Caught in a hollow branch just above eye level, a bundle wrapped in oilskin.
Pressed flat under a sheet of fallen bark -- {container}. Easy to miss.
